hero.eyebrow: International Fantastic Film Festival · Montevideo, Uruguay
hero.description:
Montevideo Fantástico is a genre film festival based in Montevideo.

Since 2005 it has programmed feature films, medium-length films, and shorts in horror, fantasy, and science fiction, with a focus on independent productions that get little distribution or never reach cinemas.

Screenings take place at various venues across the city, and the audience votes on every film. That intersection of programming and direct audience response is central to the festival.

acerca.label: Festival
acerca.subtitle: International Fantastic Film Festival · Montevideo, Uruguay
acerca.overview_text:
Montevideo Fantástico is Uruguay's first genre film festival, dedicated to horror, fantasy, and science fiction.

Since 2005 it has worked with national and international films, focusing on independent and ultra-independent productions that often fall outside traditional exhibition circuits.
acerca.identity_text:
The festival features competitive sections for short films and feature films, alongside exhibitions, parallel programmes showcasing classics, tributes to genre figures, and talks by specialists.

At each screening the audience votes on the films. That dynamic defines the result of each edition and is central to the experience of the festival.
